Id1.text: Jamaica, whose queen is Elizabeth II, is led by Patrick Allen and is the birth place of Akeem Priestley.

Id2.text: Patrick Allen and Elizabeth II led Jamaica, is the birthplace of Akeem Priestley.

Id3.text: Jamaica, which is led by Patrick Allen and Elizabeth II, is the birthplace of Akeem Priestley.
